title: D.A.Y. Republic Kids Soft Lightweight Football - Size 5, Deflated PVC Panel, Ideal for Indoors & Outdoors, Beach and Garden
features: Easy to inflate with pump (not included). Easy for children to carry and can be inflated in just a few minutes! The simplicity of inflating and deflating means that the football field will never be far away. Fantastic ball for garden, parks and beaches, picnic, campsites and BBQ activities!

Lightweight and softer material allows to introduce football and exercise to younger kids, even for use indoors! Football, once inflated measures 20cm/8in. Comes deflated. Easily inflatable using a handheld pump or with a 12v car pump

Through the game of football, passing, kicking and running children develop healthy exercise routine. Exercise assists in the development of children’s reaction, communication, motor skills and teamwork. Exercise promotes bone growth, benefits child’s height and increases mood and overall happiness. Children will have a great time improving their shooting skills, saving shots and playing mini matches against their friends etc

Small and lightweight, easy to carry, you can take it to anywhere to have a great time with your family and friends. Ideal for Camping, BBQ, Wedding, Birthday Party or beach games. Package contains one deflated PVC size 5 Plastic football
